meaning: adv.由大气压所致地,气压所致地,气压上
examples: That the two boutiques, linked by a reflected-gold corridor, are so close physically and so distinct atmospherically prompted a simple division.
The research done about the corrosion mechanism and measures of corrosion protection was mainly aim at industrial steel architecture and steel construction exposed atmospherically.
Today cathodic protection of reinforced concrete is recognised by most authorities as a well-proven solution to corrosion of reinforcement in atmospherically exposed reinforced concrete.
Don't miss Mark Rothko's nine haunting "Seagram Murals", collected in one atmospherically lit room.
So it was a very positive discussion atmospherically.
